# Harness Impact

Describe any changes to durable harness docs, contracts, ADRs, repository
process, verification, or Codex operating instructions.

-

# Approval-Sensitive Impact

Describe whether this PR changes any approval-sensitive area. If it does,
include the user approval that authorized the change.

-

# Checklist

- [ ] I ran the required verification from `AGENTS.md` and included the result
      above.
- [ ] I updated relevant durable docs under `docs/`, or this change does not
      require doc updates.
- [ ] I reviewed relevant contracts under `docs/contracts/`, or this change
      does not affect contract-covered behavior.
- [ ] I added or updated ADRs under `docs/adr/` for significant architecture or
      process decisions, or this change does not need an ADR.
- [ ] I confirmed this PR does not change externally visible GitHub write
      behavior without explicit user approval.
- [ ] I confirmed this PR does not change authentication, token, permission, or
      `gh` usage without explicit user approval.
- [ ] I confirmed this PR does not change review decision policy without
      explicit user approval, including `REQUEST_CHANGES`, dedupe, same-head
      skip, auto-approval, or low-confidence handling.
- [ ] I confirmed this PR does not change artifact storage scope, redaction
      behavior, or sensitive-data handling without explicit user approval.
